If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n     3→ * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n     4→\n     5→use std::cell::RefCell;\n     6→\n     7→use cssparser::SourceLocation;\n     8→use servo_arc::Arc;\n     9→use style::context::QuirksMode;\n    10→use style::error_reporting::{ContextualParseError, ParseErrorReporter};\n    11→use style::media_queries::MediaList;\n    12→use style::shared_lock::SharedRwLock;\n    13→use style::stylesheets::{\n    14→    AllowImportRules, Origin, Stylesheet, StylesheetInDocument, UrlExtraData,\n    15→};\n    16→use url::Url;\n    17→\n    18→#[derive(Debug)]\n    19→struct CSSError {\n    20→    pub url: Arc<Url>,\n    21→    pub line: u32,\n    22→    pub column: u32,\n    23→    pub message: String,\n    24→}\n    25→\n    26→struct TestingErrorReporter {\n    27→    errors: RefCell<Vec<CSSError>>,\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→impl TestingErrorReporter {\n    31→    pub fn new() -> Self {\n    32→        TestingErrorReporter {\n    33→            errors: RefCell::new(Vec::new()),\n    34→        }\n    35→    }\n    36→\n    37→    fn assert_messages_contain(&self, expected_errors: &[(u32, u32, &str)]) {\n    38→        let errors = self.errors.borrow();\n    39→        for (i, (error, &(line, column, message))) in errors.iter().zip(expected_errors).enumerate()\n    40→        {\n    41→            assert_eq!(\n    42→                (error.line, error.column),\n    43→                (line, column),\n    44→                \"line/column numbers of the {}th error: {:?}\",\n    45→                i + 1,\n    46→                error.message\n    47→            );\n    48→            assert!(\n    49→                error.message.contains(message),\n    50→                \"{:?} does not contain {:?}\",\n    51→                error.message,\n    52→                message\n    53→            );\n    54→        }\n    55→        if errors.len() < expected_errors.len() {\n    56→            panic!(\"Missing errors: {:#?}\", &expected_errors[errors.len()..]);\n    57→        }\n    58→        if errors.len() > expected_errors.len() {\n    59→            panic!(\"Extra errors: {:#?}\", &errors[expected_errors.len()..]);\n    60→        }\n    61→    }\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→impl ParseErrorReporter for TestingErrorReporter {\n    65→    fn report_error(\n    66→        &self,\n    67→        url: &UrlExtraData,\n    68→        location: SourceLocation,\n    69→        error: ContextualParseError,\n    70→    ) {\n    71→        self.errors.borrow_mut().push(CSSError {\n    72→            url: url.0.clone(),\n    73→            line: location.line,\n    74→            column: location.column,\n    75→            message: error.to_string(),\n    76→        })\n    77→    }\n    78→}\n    79→\n    80→#[test]\n    81→fn test_report_error_stylesheet() {\n    82→    let css = r\"\n    83→    div {\n    84→        background-color: red;\n    85→        display: invalid;\n    86→        background-image: linear-gradient(0deg, black, invalid, transparent);\n    87→        invalid: true;\n    88→    }\n    89→    @media (min-width: 10px invalid 1000px) {}\n    90→    @font-face { src: url(), invalid, url(); }\n    91→    @counter-style foo { symbols: a 0invalid b }\n    92→    @font-feature-values Sans Sans { @foo {} @swash { foo: 1 invalid 2 } }\n    93→    @invalid;\n    94→    @media screen { @invalid; }\n    95→    @supports (color: green) and invalid and (margin: 0) {}\n    96→    @keyframes foo { from invalid {} to { margin: 0 invalid 0; } }\n    97→    \";\n    98→    let url = Url::parse(\"about::test\").unwrap();\n    99→    let error_reporter = TestingErrorReporter::new();\n   100→\n   101→    let lock = SharedRwLock::new();\n   102→    let media = Arc::new(lock.wrap(MediaList::empty()));\n   103→    Stylesheet::from_str(\n   104→        css,\n   105→        url.clone().into(),\n   106→        Origin::UserAgent,\n   107→        media,\n   108→        lock,\n   109→        None,\n   110→        Some(&error_reporter),\n   111→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012hGSeHjSYNCy9T3ba75WT1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n     2→ * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n     3→ * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n     4→\n     5→//! Tests for parsing and serialization of values/properties\n     6→\n     7→use cssparser::{Parser, ParserInput};\n     8→use style::context::QuirksMode;\n     9→use style::parser::ParserContext;\n    10→use style::stylesheets::{CssRuleType, Origin};\n    11→use style_traits::{ParseError, ParsingMode};\n    12→use url::Url;\n    13→\n    14→fn parse<T, F>(f: F, s: &'static str) -> Result<T, ParseError<'static>>\n    15→where\n    16→    F: for<'t> Fn(&ParserContext, &mut Parser<'static, 't>) -> Result<T, ParseError<'static>>,\n    17→{\n    18→    let mut input = ParserInput::new(s);\n    19→    parse_input(f, &mut input)\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→fn parse_input<'i: 't, 't, T, F>(f: F, input: &'t mut ParserInput<'i>) -> Result<T, ParseError<'i>>\n    23→where\n    24→    F: Fn(&ParserContext, &mut Parser<'i, 't>) -> Result<T, ParseError<'i>>,\n    25→{\n    26→    let url_data = Url::parse(\"http://localhost\").unwrap().into();\n    27→    let context = ParserContext::new(\n    28→        Origin::Author,\n    29→        &url_data,\n    30→        Some(CssRuleType::Style),\n    31→        ParsingMode::DEFAULT,\n    32→        QuirksMode::NoQuirks,\n    33→        /* namespaces = */ Default::default(),\n    34→        None,\n    35→        None,\n    36→    );\n    37→    let mut parser = Parser::new(input);\n    38→    f(&context, &mut parser)\n    39→}\n    40→\n    41→// This is a macro so that the file/line information\n    42→// is preserved in the panic\n    43→macro_rules! assert_roundtrip_with_context {\n    44→    ($fun:expr, $string:expr) => {\n    45→        assert_roundtrip_with_context!($fun, $string, $string);\n    46→    };\n    47→    ($fun:expr, $input:expr, $output:expr) => {{\n    48→        let mut input = ::cssparser::ParserInput::new($input);\n    49→        let serialized = super::parse_input(\n    50→            |context, i| {\n    51→                let parsed = $fun(context, i).expect(&format!(\"Failed to parse {}\", $input));\n    52→                let serialized = ToCss::to_css_string(&parsed);\n    53→                assert_eq!(serialized, $output);\n    54→                Ok(serialized)\n    55→            },\n    56→            &mut input,\n    57→        )\n    58→        .unwrap();\n    59→\n    60→        let mut input = ::cssparser::ParserInput::new(&serialized);\n    61→        let unwrapped = super::parse_input(\n    62→            |context, i| {\n    63→                let re_parsed =\n    64→                    $fun(context, i).expect(&format!(\"Failed to parse serialization {}\", $input));\n    65→                let re_serialized = ToCss::to_css_string(&re_parsed);\n    66→                assert_eq!(serialized, re_serialized);\n    67→                Ok(())\n    68→            },\n    69→            &mut input,\n    70→        )\n    71→        .unwrap();\n    72→        unwrapped\n    73→    }};\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→macro_rules! assert_roundtrip {\n    77→    ($fun:expr, $string:expr) => {\n    78→        assert_roundtrip!($fun, $string, $string);\n    79→    };\n    80→    ($fun:expr, $input:expr, $output:expr) => {\n    81→        let mut input = ParserInput::new($input);\n    82→        let mut parser = Parser::new(&mut input);\n    83→        let parsed = $fun(&mut parser).expect(&format!(\"Failed to parse {}\", $input));\n    84→        let serialized = ToCss::to_css_string(&parsed);\n    85→        assert_eq!(serialized, $output);\n    86→\n    87→        let mut input = ParserInput::new(&serialized);\n    88→        let mut parser = Parser::new(&mut input);\n    89→        let re_parsed =\n    90→            $fun(&mut parser).expect(&format!(\"Failed to parse serialization {}\", $input));\n    91→        let re_serialized = ToCss::to_css_string(&re_parsed);\n    92→        assert_eq!(serialized, re_serialized)\n    93→    };\n    94→}\n    95→\n    96→macro_rules! assert_parser_exhausted {\n    97→    ($fun:expr, $string:expr, $should_exhausted:expr) => {{\n    98→        parse(\n    99→            |context, input| {\n   100→                let parsed = $fun(context, input);\n   101→                assert_eq!(parsed.is_ok(), true);\n   102→                assert_eq!(input.is_exhausted(), $should_exhausted);\n   103→                Ok(())\n   104→            },\n   105→            $string,\n   106→        )\n   107→        .unwrap()\n   108→    }};\n   109→}\n   110→\n   111→macro_rules! parse_longhand {\n   112→    ($name:ident, $s:expr) => {\n   113→        parse($name::parse, $s).unwrap()\n   114→    };\n   115→}\n   116→\n   117→mod background;\n   118→mod border;\n   119→mod box_;\n   120→mod column;\n   121→mod effects;\n   122→mod image;\n   123→mod inherited_text;\n   124→mod outline;\n   125→mod selectors;\n   126→mod supports;\n   127→mod text_overflow;\n   128→mod transition_duration;\n   129→mod transition_timing_function;\n   130→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01MYi66Mzmy6NM3gzW3TZ6Te","session_id":"928aaf3a-7f4d-461a-878f-4e0861521b2e","uuid":"1c912468-d260-4f5a-b656-7ba7ee08c6b5"}

22→use crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n    23→\n    24→#[dom_struct]\n    25→pub(crate) struct CSSMediaRule {\n    26→    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    27→    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    28→    #[no_trace]\n    29→    mediarule: RefCell<Arc<MediaRule>>,\n    30→    medialist: MutNullableDom<MediaList>,\n    31→}\n    32→\n    33→impl CSSMediaRule {\n    34→    fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet, mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>) -> CSSMediaRule {\n    35→        let list = mediarule.rules.clone();\n    36→        CSSMediaRule {\n    37→            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n    38→            mediarule: RefCell::new(mediarule),\n    39→            medialist: MutNullableDom::new(None),\n    40→        }\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    pub(crate) fn new(\n    44→        window: &Window,\n    45→        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n    46→        mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>,\n    47→        can_gc: CanGc,\n    48→    ) -> DomRoot<CSSMediaRule> {\n    49→        reflect_dom_object(\n    50→            Box::new(CSSMediaRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, mediarule)),\n    51→            window,\n    52→            can_gc,\n    53→        )\n    54→    }\n    55→\n    56→    fn medialist(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> DomRoot<MediaList> {\n    57→        self.medialist.or_init(|| {\n    58→            MediaList::new(\n    59→                self.global().as_window(),\n    60→                self.cssconditionrule.parent_stylesheet(),\n    61→                self.mediarule.borrow().media_queries.clone(),\n    62→                can_gc,\n    63→            )\n    64→        })\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-3/#the-cssmediarule-interface>\n    68→    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n    69→        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n    70→        self.mediarule\n    71→            .borrow()\n    72→            .media_queries\n    73→            .read_with(&guard)\n    74→            .to_css_string()\n    75→            .into()\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n    79→        self.cssconditionrule\n    80→            .update_rules(mediarule.rules.clone(), guard);\n    81→        if let Some(medialist) = self.medialist.get() {\n    82→            medialist.update_media_list(mediarule.media_queries.clone());\n    83→        }\n    84→        *self.mediarule.borrow_mut() = mediarule;\n    85→    }\n    86→}\n    87→\n    88→impl SpecificCSSRule for CSSMediaRule {\n    89→    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n    90→        CssRuleType::Media\n    91→    }\n    92→\n    93→    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n    94→        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n    95→        self.mediarule.borrow().to_css_string(&guard).into()\n    96→    }\n    97→}\n    98→\n    99→impl CSSMediaRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSMediaRule {\n   100→    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-media>\n   101→    fn Media(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> DomRoot<MediaList> {\n   102→        self.medialist(can_gc)\n   103→    }\n   104→}\n   105→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. 32→#[dom_struct]\n    33→pub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    34→    reflector_: Reflector,\n    35→    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n    36→\n    37→    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    38→    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    39→    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    40→ 46→            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n    47→            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n    48→            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n    49→        }\n    50→    }\n    51→\n    52→    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n    53→        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n    54→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    55→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n    56→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    57→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n    58→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    59→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n    60→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    61→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n    62→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    63→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n    64→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    65→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n    66→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    67→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n    68→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    69→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n    70→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    71→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n    72→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    73→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n    74→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    75→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n    76→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    77→        } else {\n    78→            unreachable!()\n    79→        }\n    80→    }\n    81→\n    82→    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    83→    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    84→    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n    85→        window: &Window,\n    86→        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n    87→        rule: StyleCssRule,\n    88→        can_gc: CanGc,\n    89→    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n    90→        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n    91→        match rule {\n    92→            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n    93→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n    94→            },\n    95→            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n    96→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n    97→ StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   102→            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   103→            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n   104→ DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   111→            },\n   112→            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n   113→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HPXa2PExD8b3pEPnMPXUQJ","type":"tool_result","content":"   150→\n   151→    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n   152→    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n   153→        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n   154→        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n   155→        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n   156→        // and browsers implement this behavior\n   157→        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n   158→    }\n   159→\n   160→    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n   161→        &self.parent_stylesheet\n   162→    }\n   163→\n   164→    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n   165→        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n   166→    }\n   167→\n   168→    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n   169→        match style_rule {\n   170→            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n   171→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n   172→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n   173→                }\n   174→            },\n   175→            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n   176→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n   177→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n   178→                }\n   179→            },\n   180→            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n   181→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n   182→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n   183→                }\n   184→            },\n   185→            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   186→            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   187→            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n   188→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n   189→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n   190→                }\n   191→            },\n   192→            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n   193→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n   194→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n   195→                }\n   196→            },\n   197→            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n   198→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n   199→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n   200→                }\n   201→            },\n   202→            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n   203→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n   204→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n   205→                }\n   206→            },\n   207→            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n   208→            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   209→            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n   210→            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n   211→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n   212→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n   213→                }\n   214→            },\n   215→            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n   216→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n   217→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n   218→                }\n   219→            },\n   220→            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   221→            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n   222→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n   223→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n   224→                }\n   225→            },\n   226→            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   227→            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n   228→            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   229→            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   230→            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   231→            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n   232→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n   233→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n   234→                }\n   235→            },\n   236→        }\n   237→    }\n   238→}\n   239→\n   240→impl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n   241→    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n   242→    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n   243→        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n   244→        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n   245→        // we return 0.\n   246→        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n   247→    }\n   248→\n   249→    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n   250→    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n   251→        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n   252→            None\n   253→        } else {\n   254→            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n   255→        }\n   256→    }\n   257→\n   258→    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n   259→    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n   260→        self.as_specific().get_css()\n   261→    }\n   262→\n   263→    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n   264→    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n   265→        // do nothing\n   266→    }\n   267→}\n   268→\n   269→pub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n   270→    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n   271→    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n   272→    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n   273→    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n   274→        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n   275→    }\n   276→}\n   277→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware.  69→        rules: &Arc<Locked<CssRules>>,\n    70→        guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard,\n    71→    ) {\n    72→        if let Some(rulelist) = self.rulelist.get() {\n    73→   106→    }\n   107→}\n   108→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HJWf3tkLeR5iQgVfhP9a7T","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→function assert_implements_size_container_queries() {\n     2→  assert_implements(CSS.supports(\"container-type:size\"),\n     3→                    \"Basic support for size container queries required\");\n     4→}\n     5→\n     6→function assert_implements_scroll_state_container_queries() {\n     7→  assert_implements(CSS.supports(\"container-type:scroll-state\"),\n     8→                    \"Basic support for scroll-state container queries required\");\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→function assert_implements_style_container_queries() {\n    12→  // TODO: Replace with CSS.supports() when/if this can be expressed with at-rule().\n    13→  const sheet = new CSSStyleSheet();\n    14→  // No support means the style() function is <general-enclosed> which should\n    15→  // affect serialization. Although serialization for <general-enclosed> is not\n    16→  // specified[1], unknown function names are unlikely to be resolved to be\n    17→  // serialized lower-case. Also, keeping the case is currently interoperable.\n    18→  //\n    19→  // [1] https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/7266\n    20→  sheet.replaceSync('@container STYLE(--foo: bar){}');\n    21→  assert_implements(sheet.cssRules[0].containerQuery === \"style(--foo: bar)\",\n    22→                    \"Basic support for style container queries required\");\n    23→}\n    24→\n    25→function cleanup_container_query_main() {\n    26→  const main = document.querySelector(\"#cq-main\");\n    27→  while (main.firstChild)\n    28→    main.firstChild.remove();\n    29→}\n    30→\n    31→function set_container_query_style(text) {\n    32→  let style = document.createElement('style');\n    33→  style.innerText = text;\n    34→  document.querySelector(\"#cq-main\").append(style);\n    35→  return style;\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→function test_cq_rule_invalid(query) {\n    39→  const ruleText = `@container ${query} {}`;\n    40→  test(t => {\n    41→    t.add_cleanup(cleanup_container_query_main);\n    42→    let style = set_container_query_style(ruleText);\n    43→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules.length, 0);\n    44→  }, `@container rule should be invalid: ${ruleText} {}`);\n    45→}\n    46→\n    47→function test_cq_rule_valid(query) {\n    48→  const ruleText = `@container ${query} {}`;\n    49→  test(t => {\n    50→    t.add_cleanup(cleanup_container_query_main);\n    51→    let style = set_container_query_style(`@container ${query} {}`);\n    52→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules.length, 1);\n    53→  }, `@container rule should be valid: ${ruleText} {}`);\n    54→}\n    55→\n    56→function test_cq_condition_invalid(condition) {\n    57→  test(t => {\n    58→    t.add_cleanup(cleanup_container_query_main);\n    59→    let style = set_container_query_style(`@container name ${condition} {}`);\n    60→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules.length, 0);\n    61→  }, `Query condition should be invalid: ${condition}`);\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→// Tests that 1) the condition parses, and 2) is either \"unknown\" or not, as\n    65→// specified.\n    66→function test_cq_condition_valid(condition, unknown) {\n    67→  test(t => {\n    68→    t.add_cleanup(cleanup_container_query_main);\n    69→    let style = set_container_query_style(`\n    70→      @container name ${condition} {}\n    71→      @container name (${condition}) or (not (${condition})) { main { --match:true; } }\n    72→    `);\n    73→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules.length, 2);\n    74→    const expected = unknown ? '' : 'true';\n    75→    assert_equals(getComputedStyle(document.querySelector(\"#cq-main\")).getPropertyValue('--match'), expected);\n    76→  }, `Query condition should be valid${unknown ? ' but unknown' : ''}: ${condition}`);\n    77→}\n    78→\n    79→function test_cq_condition_known(condition) {\n    80→  test_cq_condition_valid(condition, false /* unknown */);\n    81→}\n    82→\n    83→function test_cq_condition_unknown(condition) {\n    84→  test_cq_condition_valid(condition, true /* unknown */);\n    85→}\n    86→\n    87→function test_container_name_invalid(container_name) {\n    88→  test(t => {\n    89→    t.add_cleanup(cleanup_container_query_main);\n    90→    let style = set_container_query_style(`@container ${container_name} not (width) {}`);\n    91→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules.length, 0);\n    92→  }, `Container name: ${container_name}`);\n    93→}\n    94→\n    95→function test_container_name_valid(container_name) {\n    96→  test(t => {\n    97→    t.add_cleanup(cleanup_container_query_main);\n    98→    let style = set_container_query_style(`@container ${container_name} not (width) {}`);\n    99→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules.length, 1);\n   100→  }, `Container name: ${container_name}`);\n   101→}\n   102→\n   103→function test_cq_condition_serialization(query, expected) {\n   104→  test(t => {\n   105→    t.add_cleanup(cleanup_container_query_main);\n   106→    let style = set_container_query_style(`@container ${query} {}`);\n   107→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules.length, 1);\n   108→    assert_equals(style.sheet.rules[0].conditionText, expected);\n   109→  }, `@container conditionText serialization: ${query}`);\n   110→}\n   111→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01MYi66Mzmy6NM3gzW3TZ6Te","session_id":"928aaf3a-7f4d-461a-878f-4e0861521b2e","uuid":"238e0a58-5772-4cb9-beeb-05b6fe9d6eb9"}

crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\n    25→use crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\n    26→use crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\n    27→use crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\n    28→use crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\n    29→use crate::dom::window::Window;\n    30→use crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n    31→\n    32→#[dom_struct]\n    33→pub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    34→    reflector_: Reflector,\n    35→    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n    36→\n    37→    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    38→    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    39→    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    40→    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n    41→}\n    42→\n    43→impl CSSRule {\n    44→    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n    45→        CSSRule {\n    46→            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n    47→            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n    48→            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n    49→        }\n    50→    }\n    51→\n    52→    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n    53→        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n    54→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    55→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n    56→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    57→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n    58→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    59→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n    60→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    61→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n    62→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    63→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n    64→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    65→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n    66→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    67→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n    68→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    69→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n    70→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    71→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n    72→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    73→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n    74→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    75→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n    76→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    77→        } else {\n    78→            unreachable!()\n    79→        }\n    80→    }\n    81→\n    82→    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    83→    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    84→    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n    85→        window: &Window,\n    86→        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n    87→        rule: StyleCssRule,\n    88→        can_gc: CanGc,\n    89→    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n    90→        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n    91→        match rule {\n    92→            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n    93→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n    94→            },\n    95→            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n    96→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n    97→            },\n    98→            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n    99→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   100→            },\n   101→            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   102→            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   103→            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n   104→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   105→            },\n   106→            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n   107→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   108→            },\n   109→            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n   110→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   111→            },\n   112→            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n   113→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   114→            },\n   115→            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n   116→            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   117→            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n   118→            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n   119→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   120→            },\n   121→            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n   122→                window,\n   123→                parent_stylesheet,\n   124→                s,\n   125→                can_gc,\n   126→            )),\n   127→            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   128→            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n   129→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   130→            },\n   131→            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   132→            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n   133→            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   134→            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   135→            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   136→            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n   137→                window,\n   138→                parent_stylesheet,\n   139→                s,\n   140→                can_gc,\n   141→            )),\n   142→        }\n   143→    }\n   144→\n   145→    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n   146→    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n   147→        self.deparent();\n   148→        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n   149→    }\n   150→\n   151→    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n   152→    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n   153→        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n   154→        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n   155→        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n   156→        // and browsers implement this behavior\n   157→        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n   158→    }\n   159→\n   160→    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n   161→        &self.parent_stylesheet\n   162→    }\n   163→\n   164→    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n   165→        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n   166→    }\n   167→\n   168→    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n   169→        match style_rule {\n   170→            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n   171→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n   172→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n   173→                }\n   174→            },\n   175→ style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};\n\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n","numLines":277,"startLine":1,"totalLines":277}}}

self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n    67→            rule.get_condition_text()\n    68→        } else {\n    69→            unreachable!()\n    70→        }\n    71→    }\n    72→}\n You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"928aaf3a-7f4d-461a-878f-4e0861521b2e","uuid":"e9d8f701-e62d-4445-bc09-4e641ecfeba4","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssconditionrule.rs","content":"/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::RefCell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse servo_arc::Arc;\nuse style::shared_lock::{Locked, SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::CssRules as StyleCssRules;\n\nuse super::cssgroupingrule::CSSGroupingRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSConditionRuleBinding::CSSConditionRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSConditionRule {\n    cssgroupingrule: CSSGroupingRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    rules: RefCell<Arc<Locked<StyleCssRules>>>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSConditionRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rules: Arc<Locked<StyleCssRules>>,\n    ) -> CSSConditionRule {\n        CSSConditionRule {\n            cssgroupingrule: CSSGroupingRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet),\n            rules: RefCell::new(rules),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        self.cssgroupingrule.parent_stylesheet()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.cssgroupingrule.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn clone_rules(&self) -> Arc<Locked<StyleCssRules>> {\n        self.rules.borrow().clone()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rules(\n        &self,\n        rules: Arc<Locked<StyleCssRules>>,\n        guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard,\n    ) {\n        self.cssgroupingrule.update_rules(&rules, guard);\n        *self.rules.borrow_mut() = rules;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSConditionRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSConditionRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-3/#dom-cssconditionrule-conditiontext>\n    fn ConditionText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule.get_condition_text()\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule.get_condition_text()\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n}\n","numLines":73,"startLine":1,"totalLines":73}}}

crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSContainerRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    containerrule: RefCell<Arc<ContainerRule>>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSContainerRule {\n    fn new_inherited(\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n    ) -> CSSContainerRule {\n        let list = containerrule.rules.clone();\n        CSSContainerRule {\n            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n            containerrule: RefCell::new(containerrule),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn new(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSContainerRule> {\n        reflect_dom_object(\n            Box::new(CSSContainerRule::new_inherited(\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                containerrule,\n            )),\n            window,\n            can_gc,\n        )\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-3/#the-csscontainerrule-interface>\n    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.containerrule\n            .borrow()\n            .condition\n            .read_with(&guard)\n            .to_css_string()\n            .into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn get_container_name(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let name = self.containerrule.borrow().name.as_ref();\n        match name {\n            Some(name) => name.to_css_string().into(),\n            None => DOMString::new(),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn get_container_query(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.containerrule\n            .borrow()\n            .condition\n            .read_with(&guard)\n            .to_css_string()\n            .into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(\n        &self,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard,\n    ) {\n        self.cssconditionrule\n            .update_rules(containerrule.rules.clone(), guard);\n        *self.containerrule.borrow_mut() = containerrule;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl SpecificCSSRule for CSSContainerRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n        CssRuleType::Container\n    }\n\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.containerrule.borrow().to_css_string(&guard).into()\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSContainerRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSContainerRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-3/#dom-csscontainerrule-containername>\n    fn ContainerName(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.get_container_name()\n    }\n\n    /// {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QCrre8fVn6yY1wH2XCEjWu","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssrule.rs has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"928aaf3a-7f4d-461a-878f-4e0861521b2e","uuid":"ef8f5a86-a825-4737-960a-ff42642828a7","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssrule.rs","oldString":"use super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;","newString":"use super::csscontainerrule::CSSContainerRule;\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;","originalFile":"/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::Cell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};\n\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":8,"oldLines":6,"newStart":8,"newLines":7,"lines":[" use style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};"," use style::stylesheets::{CssRule as should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n    if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":67,"oldLines":6,"newStart":67,"newLines":8,"lines":["             rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule","         } else if let Some(rule) = super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse
